name: @mis-plugins/codegraph-coverage
description: codegraph wiring STEP 1 — code→artifact coverage-hole 공통 메커니즘 (DEC-2026-06-03-codegraph-deliverable-wiring §5 STEP 1). codegraph .codegraph/codegraph.db 의 코드 엔티티(route/method) 전수 열거 → 산출물 code-ref set-diff → '코드有 산출물無' coverage-hole 을 비차단 reference-lens 로 산출. trust 경계 절대: 결정적 gate inject ❌ / severity low|medium ceiling / no-simulation(실 SQLite read / 환경부재 exit 3). 무의존성(node:sqlite built-in).
